product_overview: A lightweight Next.js frontend game portal that hosts casual browser games (Bubble Pop, Candy Match, Carrom). The interface should allow users to launch and play games smoothly while preserving performance, predictable state updates, and good SEO/UX.
core_goals: Deliver responsive, playable game experiences for Bubble Pop, Candy Match, and Carrom from the browser without authentication.
Fix critical render-time bugs (notably Carrom refs accessed during render) to ensure the UI updates correctly and game state remains consistent.
Eliminate cascading renders and stale-closure bugs by correcting useEffect and dependency arrays to improve runtime performance.
Increase type safety and reduce reckless usage of any to prevent logic errors and improve maintainability.
Improve UI/UX and SEO small issues (image optimization, HTML escaping) to reduce warnings and improve page load metrics.

features.name: Play Bubble Pop
features.description: Launch and play the Bubble Pop casual game by clicking bubbles to pop them, score points, and complete levels.
user_flows: Navigate to /games/bubble-pop -> See Bubble Pop canvas and UI load -> Click on bubbles to pop them -> See pop animation for each bubble -> See score increment after a pop -> Reach level objective -> See level complete or victory screen

Navigate to /games/bubble-pop -> See Bubble Pop canvas and UI load -> Click on bubbles to pop them -> See no score update after popping -> See game UI become unresponsive or frozen -> See an on-screen error or prompt to retry

features.name: Play Candy Match
features.description: Play Candy Match by swapping candies to form matches, clear candies, and accumulate points until the level ends.
user_flows: Navigate to /games/candy-match -> See Candy Match board and controls load -> Swap candies -> See matched candies removed from the board -> See score increment after matches -> See new candies fall into place -> Reach target score and see Game Over / Score screen

Navigate to /games/candy-match -> See Candy Match board attempt to load -> Board stays blank or incomplete after load -> Attempt to swap candies -> See no response to swaps -> See on-screen message indicating 'Game failed to initialize' or a prompt to reload

features.name: Play Carrom
features.description: Play the Carrom board game by aiming and shooting the striker, moving pieces, taking turns, and scoring points.
user_flows: Navigate to /games/carrom -> See Carrom board and controls load -> Aim striker -> Shoot striker -> See pieces move according to physics -> See current turn and scores update correctly -> See match progress and final score when game ends

Navigate to /games/carrom -> See Carrom board and controls load -> Aim striker -> Shoot striker -> See pieces move but current turn or score display does not update -> See UI show stale or incorrect turn information -> See option to reload or observe console error

features.name: Play Bubble Pop
user_interactions: Click on bubbles to pop them
